title: neobotrydium cristatum
intro: Neobotrydium cristatum, also known as the crested neobotrydium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. While not much information is available about the plant's medicinal properties, it is said to have potential health benefits. However, there is limited research on its effects, and it is not commonly used in herbal remedies.
